workflows.description: Rules for scoring based on structural elements
steps: Media Content: 50 points if video blocks are present (Video type)
Media Content: 50 points if audio blocks are present (Audio type)
Image Density: 40 points if 3+ image blocks are present (Image type)
Link Density: 30 points if 3+ URLs in content (Hyperlink type)
Length-Based: 20-25 points bias for short content (<200 chars, <=2 blocks) (Note type)
Length-Based: 20-25 points bias for long content (>500 chars, 3+ blocks) (Document type)
Financial Indicators: 30 points if currency symbols or 'total' keyword (Invoice type)
